# `hideborderx`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128  
**Parameters:** `b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>HideBorderX( [byte] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[byte] - 0 = 40 columns, 1 = 38 columns</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Sets screen columns to 40 (0) or 38 (1).</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
HideBorderX(0); // 40 columns
HideBorderX(1); // 38 columns
</code>


</div>
